blockingIssues.description: sd-core/src/horizon.rs:230 DateTime urgency semantics still mismatch stated contract (instant horizon can still return 0.0 while docs specify >= 1.0).
sd-core/src/horizon.rs:155 public range_start/range_end paths still use expect() on publicly constructible Horizon variants, leaving panic paths for invalid variant payloads.
sd-core/src/dynamics.rs:901 detect_horizon_drift still misclassifies first-time horizon assignment due to all() on an empty shifts iterator.
sd-core/src/dynamics.rs:1126 detect_oscillation still counts horizon mutation reversals even when horizon argument is None, violating regression-safety for horizon=None.
sd-core/src/dynamics.rs:1823 compensating strategy persistence scaling still conflicts with expected Month-vs-Year significance behavior for 2-week oscillation.
sd-core/src/tree.rs:431 children_by_horizon still returns Option<Vec<&Node>> instead of the contracted Vec<&Node> API.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Require explicit verification evidence for Step 6 (cargo doc/manual checks) before allowing followedProcedure=true, or mark Step 6 optional if not intended as a gate.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Multiple rerun reviews (horizon-type, horizon-dynamics-new, horizon-dynamics-relative, horizon-tree) again found missing cargo doc/manual verification evidence while handoffs still report followedProcedure=true.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify precedence when feature/spec API contracts conflict with local module conventions (e.g., contract says Vec return while existing tree patterns use Option<Vec>).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: horizon-tree continues to follow local Option-returning convention while mission contract/spec require Vec, yielding recurring contract mismatch during scrutiny.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add an explicit drift assertion for first-time horizon assignment (None -> Some) to prevent empty-iterator misclassification regressions.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: horizon-dynamics-new failure persists because current drift assertions do not cover initial assignment semantics.

rejectedObservations.observation: Repeated per-feature notes that rust-library-worker Step 6 evidence is missing.
No-panics convention statement from shared-state notes.
horizon-tree test_children_by_horizon_all_none does not assert order.
rejectedObservations.reason: feature-specific non-blocking test gap; not a shared-state guidance update
